text.title: typescript-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for typescript-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using any[] as the items type in a reusable list component.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Loses type safety in renderItem — errors like accessing a non-existent property only surface at runtime.

failure-mode.description: Using the non-null assertion operator (!) on values that could legitimately be null.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ! silently produces a runtime error; assertDefined throws with a message and narrows the type correctly.
